catalog.name: PhilSA POC — STAC Catalog
catalog.description: Earth-observation products from the PhilSA POC STAC API. Raster collections are tiled live by TiTiler; by-reference optical collections without a public COG are listed as info groups. Generated by `dashboard/build_catalog_from_stac.py` — re-run to resync.

members.name: Sentinel-2 NDVI
members.description: Vegetation greenness index. Green = dense vegetation, red = bare/water. Tiled on the fly by TiTiler from the `sentinel2-ndvi` STAC collection (9 item(s)).

members.name: Sentinel-1 SAR (VV, dB)
members.description: Radar backscatter (grayscale). Sees through cloud; bright = rough/built. Tiled on the fly by TiTiler from the `sentinel1-sar` STAC collection (8 item(s)).

members.name: ESRI Land Cover (10 m, annual)
members.description: Annual land-cover classes (Impact Observatory). Categorical context layer. Tiled on the fly by TiTiler from the `esri-10m-lulc` STAC collection (8 item(s)).

members.name: Sentinel-2 True Colour
members.description: Natural-colour optical view (Sentinel-2, 10 m). Tiled on the fly by TiTiler from the `sentinel2-truecolor` STAC collection (9 item(s)).

members.name: Diwata-2 SMI (true colour)
members.description: Philippine Diwata-2 multispectral imager (by reference; public COG on GCS). Tiled on the fly by TiTiler from the `diwata-2` STAC collection (12 item(s)).

members.name: SkySat (Planet) — high-res optical (by reference, not tiled)
members.description:
The `skysat` STAC collection (45 item(s)) is catalogued **by reference** — only thumbnails and cloud-hosted metadata are public, so there is no map-tileable COG to render here. Browse the items via the STAC API: http://localhost:8082/collections/skysat/items

![preview](https://storage.googleapis.com/dpad-bucket/SS/Scene/20230616_222848_ssc15d3_0013/20230616_222848_ssc15d3_0013_pansharpened_thumbnail.png)

members.name: PlanetScope (Planet) — daily optical (by reference, not tiled)
members.description:
The `planetscope` STAC collection (98 item(s)) is catalogued **by reference** — only thumbnails and cloud-hosted metadata are public, so there is no map-tileable COG to render here. Browse the items via the STAC API: http://localhost:8082/collections/planetscope/items

![preview](https://storage.googleapis.com/dpad-bucket/PS/Scene/20230510_011527_88_24b4/20230510_011527_88_24b4_3B_AnalyticMS_SR_8b_harmonized_clip_thumbnail.png)
